title: 22 Tex. Admin. Code § 1.5 - Terms Defined Herein
text:
The following words, terms, and acronyms, when used in this
chapter, shall have the following meanings, unless the context clearly
indicates otherwise.

(1) The Act--The
Architects' Registration Law.
